title: PRD: Webhook retries
text:
# PRD — Webhook retries
Product area: API & Webhooks
Status: Not started
Author: Product team

## Problem
Customers repeatedly request webhook retries. This appears in support tickets and NPS feedback for the API & Webhooks area.

## Proposed solution
Implement webhook retries with configuration in workspace settings.

## Success metrics
Reduce API & Webhooks-related complaints by 30%; adoption > 40% in 60 days.

## Priority
Backlog — not yet prioritized.
